abilities.name: dancer
abilities.shortEffect: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.
abilities.effect: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.
abilities.flavorText: Whenever a dance move is used in battle, the Pokémon will copy the user to immediately perform that dance move itself.
